blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 125 ft. Looking ahead, 42 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
